untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a prior upMove from B to A and calculation of Fibonacci retracement levels (38%-62% range) based on that specific prior move. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition and dynamic support/resistance level calculation that cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The 62% retracement level is a dynamic value dependent on identifying the prior upMove, which requires historical bar analysis beyond the scope of single-bar indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Signal pattern 'Above the Stomach' involves identifying a prior straight-line upMove, measuring its extent, calculating Fibonacci retracement zones, and entering at the 62% level with confirmation. While entry logic uses price rebound at 62% retracement and exit uses close below that level, the actual retracement calculation requires pattern-matching logic (identifying points B and A) not available in the allowed indicator set. Author did not provide specific success rates, exit targets, or volume confirmation criteria. Recommend manual implementation or use of custom pattern detection function.
